subcodes.first_line: O my God, my Lord, my Master, my Beloved, and my Desire! Whensoever I intend Thy remembrance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای خدای من و پروردگار من و آقای من و محبوب من و مقصود من هر زمان اراده ذکرت
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
